personas.name: Business Traveller
personas.description: Professional travelling to Banyuwangi for work, meetings, or corporate assignments.
personas.review_evidence: hotel untuk perjalanan bisnis maupun liburan bersama keluarga

personas.name: Family with Children
personas.description: Families travelling for vacation with kids, often multi-night stays.
pain_points: AC in kids room not cold enough
personas.review_evidence: perfect for families on vacation, kids club and pool are so good

personas.name: Couple / Honeymooner
personas.description: Romantic getaways, couples seeking quality time together.
personas.review_evidence: nice hotel to stay with your love ones

personas.name: Solo Traveller
personas.description: Independent travellers exploring Banyuwangi, often visiting Ijen.
personas.review_evidence: comfortable for solo stay, very clean and modern

personas.name: Backpacker
personas.description: Budget-conscious travellers, often transit to/from Bali or Ijen.
pain_points: price higher than typical backpacker hostels

personas.name: Government / Corporate Guest
personas.description: Official government travel, corporate booking, often with per-diem budget.
pain_points: breakfast not included in some rates

personas.name: Travel Group
personas.description: Organized groups, retreats, or company outings.
personas.review_evidence: we are a small group of three who stayed for work, wonderful experience

personas.name: Foreign Tourist
personas.description: International visitors, primarily from Europe, Australia, and Asia.
personas.review_evidence: staff don't speak English, there were lots of misunderstandings

personas.name: Domestic Tourist
personas.description: Indonesian travellers from other cities visiting Banyuwangi.
personas.review_evidence: setiap ke banyuwangi pasti stay di sini

personas.name: Transit Traveller
personas.description: Guests staying 1 night before catching ferry to Bali or flight out.
pain_points: price for short stay feels high
personas.review_evidence: transit hotel between Banyuwangi and Bali
